message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
{"type":"shutdown_request","requestId":"shutdown-1770838443903@carson-gross","from":"team-lead","reason":"Task #18 (Retrospective) is complete. All 13 changes committed. Shutting down the team per project owner request. Thank you for your contributions.","timestamp":"2026-02-11T19:34:03.903Z"}
</teammate-message>

input.content: Shutting down. Good session — the GTD hypermedia architecture is clean and the team produced better designs than any of us would have individually. The patterns are documented, the implementation is solid, and the retro changes will improve the next round. See you on the next task.

toolUseResult.message: Shutdown approved. Sent confirmation to team-lead. Agent carson-gross is now exiting.
